title: VS Code CLI release download and LSP toolchain bootstrap

source.subject: feat(toolchain): bootstrap CLI release download and dependency fetch

body:
VS Code extension downloads cli-latest, materializes toolchain dependencies, and launches `beskid lsp` with logged install failures.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid_vscode`
- **Commit:** [`0a8a73c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_vscode/commit/0a8a73c)
- **Subject:** feat(toolchain): bootstrap CLI release download and dependency fetch
- **Completed:** 2026-05-25

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-editor-lsp-cli`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CLI LSP launch & VS Code toolchain** (`v03-editor-lsp-cli`).
